name: OLD MARKET CAPITAL Corp
summary: Old Market Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: OMCC) is a Delaware holding company that indirectly owns a 60.9% controlling interest in Amplex Electric Inc. through Amplex Holdings, Inc. Amplex provides broadband internet, voice over internet protocol (VOIP), and video services primarily in Northwest and North Central Ohio, serving approximately 13,000 broadband customers including residential and commercial clients via fiber optic and fixed position wireless networks.

products.name: Broadband Internet
products.description: High-speed internet via fiber optic and fixed position wireless networks in Northwest and North Central Ohio.

products.name: Voice over Internet Protocol (VOIP)
products.description: Internet-based voice communication services offered by Amplex to residential and commercial customers.

products.name: Video Services
products.description: Video services provided by Amplex alongside broadband and VOIP offerings.

products.name: Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH)
products.description: Fiber optic connectivity extended to homes in underserved rural Ohio communities.

partnerships.partner_name: Westlake Services LLC dba Westlake Financial
partnerships.description: Purchased substantially all finance receivables and repossessed assets from the Company in April 2024.
Local power utility with which Amplex has a relationship supporting FTTH expansion.
Provides a $21 million Reconnect loan program supporting Amplex's rural broadband expansion.
